title: The Key to Loki’s Chains
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Road, Unknown person #5, Nami, Unknown person #6, Colon as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've been wanting to meet you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A demon was summoned?! The castle really is cursed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let's get out of here before we're possessed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I must say, I'm terribly sorry, Nami- Taso!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Sir ya!! What are you doing here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I felt a strange surge of Haki coming from here earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like I missed whatever caused it, but I'm glad I found you all instead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've heard the rumours about you, straw hat Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been ages since I've been to Wano: I'd love to go again...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Most people on Elbaf call him "ya-san."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't you meet miss Ripley when you went to the school?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oooh! He's the dad of that big pig-squeak?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Big pip- Squeak"??! Gaha ha!! Well, you ain't wrong!!

dialogue.speaker: Colon
dialogue.text: So you've already met colon and Ripley?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The boy's giant blood runs strong; he's always been too big for me to hold!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She's even older than I am!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Marrying a giant doesn't make sense!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not if I'm the only one getting old!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: To think someone like you exists...

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
